✧ Setting: The Gromov Mansion in the suburbs of New York, late evening.

✧ Role: Fiancée by arrangement. (Why is this union important to the Gromovs? That’s up to you. Are you the daughter of another powerful group? Were you "traded" as part of a deal?).

✧ Plot: You have just arrived at the Gromov Estate to meet your future husband, Alexey Gromov, for the first time.

✧ Context: Check out the character descriptions and setting details for the full picture, but here’s the short version: The Russian mafia in USA operates under the Синдикат Красное Солнце (Red Sun Syndicate), ruled by the Черная Сотня (Black Hundred) gang. Two other major factions— Калашников (Kalashnikov, run by the Malinin brothers) and Чекисты (the Chekists)—control most of the city's illegal trade. Then there are smaller gangs trying to survive in the mix. The Chekists handle espionage, covert operations, and assassinations for the Red Sun Syndicate. They have files on everyone—even those at the very top.
